name: Spam / Unsolicited Bulk Email Report
description: Internal form for employees to flag persistent spam getting past the email filters. Lower priority than phishing or BEC, but helps the SOC tune filters and block senders.
title: Report Spam or Unwanted Bulk Email
intro: Getting the same junk email over and over? Marketing blasts you never signed up for? Use this form to let us know — we'll see if there's a pattern and tune the spam filters. This isn't urgent, so use the Phishing or BEC forms instead if you think the email is actually trying to trick you.
submit_message: Thanks — we've logged it. We'll review for filter tuning. You can also delete or block-sender these directly in your email client.

fields.label: Your email
fields.help: So we can follow up if needed.

fields.label: Sender address (or domain)
fields.help: The 'From' address — or just the domain if it's coming from many addresses on the same domain.

fields.label: A recent subject line
fields.sample_value: FINAL CHANCE - 80% off premium subscriptions today only

fields.label: How often are you getting these?
options: First time, but it looks like bulk spam

fields.label: What kind of email is it?
Have you tried unsubscribing?
fields.help: Some 'unsubscribe' links are actually trackers or scams — that's useful for us to know.
options: No, I didn't want to click anything
Yes, and the link looked suspicious so I closed it

fields.label: Anything else?
fields.help: Optional. Are coworkers getting it too? Anything weird about it?
fields.sample_value: A few people on my team mentioned getting the same one. The unsubscribe link redirects through three different domains.

alert_template.title: Spam report from {{reporter_email}}: {{sender_email}}
